title: Is Trump profiting off America's 250th? Ethics groups question merch
shortDescription: The Trump Organization is marketing a range of merchandise, from a $38 water bottle to a $200 airplane blanket, with the “exclusive Trump 250 logo.”

title: Court throws out clerk's sentence in 2020 election scheme case
shortDescription: The unanimous decision from a three-judge appeals panel upheld Peters' conviction but found the lower court incorrectly sentenced her.

title: Trump is furious at NATO over Iran. What are his options?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is reexamining the U.S. relationship with NATO over his anger with allies who refused to join the war against Iran.

title: Will high costs, gas prices play into midterm elections in Georgia?
shortDescription: Gas prices hit more than $4 a gallon on Tuesday, and now voters in the special election for Marjorie Taylor Greene's seat are the first to weigh in.

title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
shortDescription: Trump fired Attorney General Pam Bondi after controversies over withholding Jeffrey Epstein documents and the dismissal of charges against Democrats.

title: Why is Trump talking about Tiger Woods? They connect on more than golf
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he has talked to Tiger Woods since the golfer crashed and was charged with a DUI. Woods is dating Vanessa Trump, Kai's mom

title: Trump sued by Dems, advocates over mail-in voting restrictions
shortDescription: A series of voting rights groups and top Democrats have sued President Donald Trump to block his executive order restricting mail-in voting.

title: Senators rip putting Trump's signature on US money amid economic woes
shortDescription: In a letter to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, the senators suggest the move may be intended to distract the public from their economic struggles.

title: What Trump said in his speech about objectives in Iran, a shifting list
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has given a list of changing objectives for Iran. What did he say in his address to the nation last night, April 1? See transcript.

title: A prominent election denier is claiming fraud in California elections
shortDescription: California’s Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco is investigating the 2025 election in which Democrats were given the green light to redistrict.

title: Trump’s birthright citizenship order could impact millions
shortDescription: The Supreme Court is weighing the fate of millions under Trump’s birthright citizenship order.

title: Analysis: Trump's speech on Iran
shortDescription: President Donald Trump made it clear that he is prepared to leave a messy situation behind in his primetime speech on the war in Iran.

title: Trump tells Iran to make a deal 'before it is too late'
shortDescription: Oil prices rose as stocks wavered on Thursday, after Trump vowed to strike Iran "extremely hard" over the coming weeks.

title: Trump's ballroom approved by planning board, although blocked by judge
shortDescription: The National Capital Planning Commission voted to approve Trump's plan for a $400 million White House ballroom.

title: In Trump's war, a fast start and a messy exit from Iran
shortDescription: 33 days after the Iran war began, President Trump addresses the nation on when it might end, and how.

title: Trump claimed 'victories' in his Iran war speech. Read the full transcript.
shortDescription: President Donald Trump delivered a primetime speech to the nation on the war against Iran. Read what he said on Wednesday, April 1.

title: What did Trump say in his speech? What to know about Iran address
shortDescription: In a 19-minute address, the president gave little indication on the Iran war's conclusion but promised gas price hikes would be a 'short-term' problem

title: Trump threatens to hit 'every' Iran electrical plant
shortDescription: In an address to the nation, President Trump threatened to hit every single one of Iran's electric generating plants if there's no deal.

title: Trump says US will bring Iran 'back to the Stone Ages'
shortDescription: President Trump gave a national address on the Iran war, threatening to take Iran "back to the Stone Ages where they belong."

title: See President Trump deliver White House address on Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump delivers an address to the nation from the White House on Wednesday evening to "provide an important update on Iran."

title: Watch live as President Trump addresses nation on Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump will address the nation "to provide an important update on Iran" as he anticipates the U.S. will end its military campaign soon.

title: Pastor likens Trump's experiences to Jesus
shortDescription: Pastor Paula White-Cain, a spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump, likened Trump's experiences to those of Jesus Christ at an Easter event.

title: Trump says Iran war is 'nearing completion' but not done in speech
shortDescription: The president didn't tell Americans that the fight is over or that troops are returning home.
